Job description

ABOUT GOETTL

 

Goettl Air Conditioning & Plumbing is a PE-backed, multi-branch home services company operating across six markets: San Antonio, Austin, Phoenix, Tucson, Las Vegas, and Reno. We deliver HVAC and plumbing services at scale — and we run on data. From dispatch optimization to operational reporting, analytics is central to how we manage performance and make decisions.

 

ROLE SUMMARY

 

We are looking for a detail-oriented and technically capable intern to support our analytics team in building Power BI dashboards that give business leaders clear, actionable visibility into operations. This role sits at the intersection of data engineering and stakeholder communication — you will spend time understanding what leaders need to see, then build the infrastructure to show them.

 

WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

Partner with branch managers, operations leaders, and department heads across HVAC and plumbing to understand their reporting needs and key performance questions.
Design, build, and maintain Power BI dashboards that surface operational metrics including job performance, technician productivity, revenue trends, and branch-level comparisons.
Write and optimize SQL queries to extract, transform, and model data from our core systems, including ServiceTitan (field service management) and Databricks (cloud data platform).
Translate raw data into clean, intuitive visualizations that non-technical users can navigate confidently.
Document data definitions, metric logic, and dashboard usage to support ongoing maintenance and adoption.
Participate in sprint reviews and stakeholder demos — communicate what you built and why.

 

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

 

Currently pursuing a degree in Data Science, Business Analytics, Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field.
Hands-on experience with Power BI — ability to build reports, write DAX measures, and design for usability.
Proficiency in SQL — comfortable writing joins, aggregations, CTEs, and filtering logic against real datasets.
Strong communication skills — able to ask the right questions of stakeholders and translate business needs into data requirements.
Organized and self-directed; able to manage multiple dashboard requests in parallel.

 

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

 

Experience with cloud data platforms (Databricks, Snowflake, Azure Synapse, or similar).
Familiarity with field service, home services, or operations-heavy business data.
Exposure to data modeling concepts (star schema, fact/dimension tables).
Experience with Python or PySpark for data transformation (a plus, not required).
Familiarity with Git for version control — ability to commit, branch, and collaborate in a shared repository.

 

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

 

By the end of the internship, you will have:

 

Delivered 3–5 production-ready Power BI dashboards actively used by Goettl business leaders.
Built or contributed to underlying SQL data models that feed those dashboards.
Earned credibility as a reliable analyst who listens well, builds fast, and communicates clearly.

 

OUR TECHNOLOGY STACK

 

Power BI  |  Databricks (Azure)  |  SQL / Spark SQL  |  ServiceTitan |  Sage Intacct  |  UKG

Las Vegas, NV

Goettl was founded in 1939 and is currently a portfolio company of Cortec group, a New York City based private equity firm. The company is one of the largest providers of essential residential services in the Southwest serving 50K+ homeowners annually across Arizona, Nevada, California, and Texas. The company creates value by acquiring established local brands, applying experienced management talent, and implementing proven processes. Goettl is the winner of Inc. 5000 fastest growing companies in 2017, 2018, 2019, and 2020.

You may go to goettl.com to learn more about the company. For our complete career page with all open jobs within the company, please visit goettl.com/careers
